title: Haven Growth
description: Squat, crouch, sprint, run, it doesn't matter! We grow anything*
body:
**![Haven Growth](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/72bf94393fd4c2c0842769bfbda5be79d4899c24f720cc9015e079f0c277f298/68747470733a2f2f692e696d6775722e636f6d2f5a4e306363714d2e706e67)**

[**![](https://dl.dropboxusercontent.com/scl/fi/msmfi7d9sk130op6oenpc/BH_CHA_Promo.png?rlkey=j1i1v5crbbqdu6z71ndr3w2r1&dl=0)**](https://www.bisecthosting.com/haven)

**What is Haven Growth?**

Tired of staring at the crops and saplings to grow? Look no further than the install button!

All you need to do is to spam Crouch or Sprint and anything that can will grow near you (adjustable in the config)

Highly configurable!

**Features:**

*   Crouch (squat/twerk) to grow crops/saplings or anything that bone meal can be used on.
*   Configurable distance up to 10 blocks away.
*   Don't want effects? toggle them off.
*   Wanna whitelist or blacklist items? no problem!
*   Compatible with Botania and Mystical Agriculture out of the box!

**Known Issues:**

*   None that i'm aware of.
